files.content:
import type { SVGProps } from "react";

const Ubuntu = (props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) => (
  <svg
    {...props}
    xmlnsXlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"
    viewBox="0 0 100 100"
  >
    <circle cx="50" cy="50" r="45" fill="#f47421" />
    <circle
      cx="50"
      cy="50"
      r="21.8"
      fill="none"
      stroke="#fff"
      strokeWidth="8.6"
    />
    <g id="a">
      <circle cx="19.4" cy="50" r="8.4" fill="#f47421" />
      <path stroke="#f47421" strokeWidth="3.2" d="M67 50h10" />
      <circle cx="19.4" cy="50" r="6" fill="#fff" />
    </g>
    <use xlink:href="#a" transform="rotate(120 50 50)" />
    <use xlink:href="#a" transform="rotate(240 50 50)" />
  </svg>
);

export { Ubuntu };
